variants.modifierDescription: Enemies can deal enhanced slash damage. Finishing damage is not resisted.
Maximum Warframe Energy capacity is quartered. Energy Siphon is less effective.
Enemies have Improved/Added armor. Corrosive Projection effects are halved.
